title: Grastidium kietaense
taxonomy: Grastidium kietaense is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to the island of Bougainville in Papua New Guinea. The classification of Grastidium kietaense places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Liliophyta, and class Liliopsida. Further, it is classified as an evergreen, sedge-like monocot. As a member of the Restionaceae family, it is closely related to other plants in this family.
